central.modern_customer_support_software_tickets: Modern customer support software — tickets, chat, knowledge base, and automation in one helpdesk built for growing teams.
central.built_different_title: Support, IT, and customer context — unified
central.built_different_subtitle: Most teams stitch together an inbox, a knowledge base, a CRM sidebar, and a separate ITSM product. {brand} brings the workflows that usually live in four tools into one helpdesk your agents actually enjoy using.
central.diff_support_itsm_title: Support and ITSM in one place
central.diff_support_itsm_body: Turn on Service Desk when you need ITIL-style queues, change calendars, approval workflows, problem records, and major incident war rooms — without migrating to another product.
central.diff_customer_360_body: See CRM profiles, recent Shopify orders, health scores, and a unified activity timeline beside the conversation — no tab switching to another system.
central.diff_asset_discovery_body: Scan your network, import devices as assets, and link hardware and software records directly to tickets and service catalog requests.
central.diff_skills_sla_body: Route tickets to agents with the right skills and apply SLA policies by team or customer tier — not just one global timer for everyone.
central.diff_multi_brand_body: Run separate portals, inboxes, knowledge bases, and ticket forms for each brand from a single agent workspace.
central.diff_custom_domain_body: Every team gets a dedicated workspace URL on signup. Connect your own support domain on Pro for a fully branded experience.
central.diff_semantic_kb_body: Vector search surfaces the right articles before customers submit. AI deflection on the portal and live chat reduces repeat questions.
central.diff_realtime_body: Live ticket updates, agent presence, and collision warnings so two people never reply to the same customer at once.
central.diff_performance_body: Track how agents perform against SLAs and CSAT with built-in scoring — no separate workforce analytics tool required.
central.diff_catalog_approvals_body: Publish structured request types on your portal with custom fields, then route them through multi-step approvals before work begins.

ecommerce.hero_title: Customer support software for online stores
ecommerce.hero_highlight: Turn order questions into loyal customers.
ecommerce.hero_subtitle: Unify Shopify order context, email, live chat, and your help center in one inbox. Deflect WISMO tickets with AI and SLAs that survive sale season spikes.

pains.title: Refund and delivery tickets flood the inbox
pains.body: Agents jump between Shopify, Gmail, and WhatsApp with no shared history or ownership.

pains.title: Peak sale weeks break response times
pains.body: Manual triage cannot keep up when order volume doubles overnight.

pains.title: Help center does not deflect repeat questions
pains.body: Customers still email about shipping, returns, and order status because self-service is disconnected.

features.title: Shopify in the ticket sidebar
features.body: See orders, fulfillment status, and customer spend without leaving the conversation.

features.title: Live chat + branded portal
features.body: Embed chat on your storefront and let customers track tickets on a portal that matches your brand.

features.title: AI deflection & reply drafts
features.body: Suggest answers from your KB and draft replies for common order and return questions.

features.title: SLA policies for peak seasons
features.body: Set response targets, business hours, and escalation rules before your next campaign.

features.title: CSAT on resolve
features.body: Measure satisfaction after every ticket close and spot product or fulfillment issues early.

features.title: Affordable INR pricing
features.body: Start on Professional from ₹999/mo with optional AI Copilot and Integrations add-ons.

faq.q: Does helpefi integrate with Shopify?
faq.a: Yes. Connect Shopify on Pro or add the Integrations Pack on Professional to pull order and customer data into every ticket.

faq.q: Can we handle festival sale volume spikes?
faq.a: Yes. Use SLA policies, automation, and AI triage to prioritize urgent order issues during high-traffic periods.

faq.q: How fast can a D2C brand go live?
faq.a: Most teams connect email and publish a help center within a day. Live chat embed code takes minutes.

ecommerce.cta_title: Ready to support shoppers at scale?
ecommerce.cta_body: Start a free trial with full platform access. Connect your channels and see order context in your first ticket.

it-teams.hero_title: Helpdesk and ITSM for internal IT teams
it-teams.hero_subtitle: Run employee support on Professional, then add Service Desk ITSM for incidents, changes, problems, approvals, and major incident war rooms — all in one workspace.

pains.title: Employees email IT while changes live in spreadsheets
pains.body: Incidents, access requests, and change approvals have no shared queue or audit trail.

pains.title: Freshservice or Jira Service Management is overkill
pains.body: Small and mid-size IT teams pay enterprise prices for features they never use.

pains.title: Major incidents lack a coordinated war room
pains.body: Outages spread across chat threads with no single timeline or post-incident review.

features.title: Service Desk ITSM add-on
features.body: Type queues for incidents, changes, and problems with ITIL-style workflows on any paid plan.

features.title: Service catalog & approvals
features.body: Publish laptop, access, and software requests with approval chains agents can track.

features.title: Change calendar & CAB-ready flows
features.body: Plan maintenance windows and link changes to related incidents and problems.

features.title: CMDB & asset discovery
features.body: Track hardware and software on Pro, with network discovery for growing IT departments.

features.title: SSO for agents
features.body: SAML and OIDC on Pro so IT staff sign in with your identity provider.

features.title: Transparent add-on pricing
features.body: Add Service Desk ITSM when you need it — configure pricing in platform admin.

faq.q: Do we need Pro to use Service Desk ITSM?
faq.a: No. Service Desk is a monthly add-on on any paid plan. Pro bundles platform features like AI, integrations, SSO, and assets.

faq.q: Can we start with employee helpdesk only?
faq.a: Yes. Many IT teams begin on Professional for tickets and SLAs, then enable Service Desk when ITIL workflows are needed.

faq.q: Is there a major incident war room?
faq.a: Yes, included with the Service Desk add-on — coordinate responders, timeline, and post-incident review in one place.

it-teams.cta_title: Give your IT team one system of record
it-teams.cta_body: Try helpefi free, set up your employee portal, and enable Service Desk when your processes mature.

agencies.hero_subtitle: Run separate brands, portals, and inboxes per client from a single workspace. Give each client their own subdomain or custom domain without spinning up new tools.

pains.title: Every client wants their own support portal
pains.body: Managing separate Freshdesk accounts multiplies cost and admin overhead.

pains.title: Agents context-switch between client inboxes
pains.body: Shared Gmail labels and spreadsheets do not scale past a handful of retainers.

pains.title: Reporting per client is manual
pains.body: Exporting tickets and CSAT by brand every month wastes billable hours.

features.title: Multi-brand workspaces
features.body: Separate portals, KB skins, inboxes, and SLAs per client brand on Professional and above.

features.title: Custom domain on Pro
features.body: Host each client portal on their own domain for a fully white-label experience.

features.title: Role-based agent access
features.body: Invite agents per brand and control who sees which client queue.

features.title: Per-brand analytics
features.body: Track ticket volume, response times, and CSAT filtered by brand for client QBRs.

features.title: Automation per client
features.body: Macros, routing rules, and SLA policies tuned to each retainer's SLA commitments.

features.title: Scales with your roster
features.body: Add clients as brands instead of provisioning new SaaS accounts every time.

faq.q: Can each client have their own portal URL?
faq.a: Yes. Each brand gets its own portal path and styling. Pro adds custom domain support per workspace.

faq.q: How many brands can we run?
faq.a: Professional includes multi-brand workspace support. Limits depend on your plan tier — see pricing for agent and ticket limits.

faq.q: Can clients submit tickets without seeing other brands?
faq.a: Yes. Portals and inboxes are isolated per brand. Customers only see the brand they contact.

agencies.cta_title: Support every client from one login
agencies.cta_body: Start your trial, create a brand per client, and publish branded portals in an afternoon.

ai_capabilities.title: Customer deflection

steps.body: Pick a subdomain, register in seconds, and get a dedicated environment for your team — no credit card required.
steps.detail: Your workspace lives on its own subdomain with isolated data, roles, and admin access.

steps.body: Follow the guided setup wizard to configure email, chat widget, SMS, portal branding, SLA policies, and service catalog.
steps.detail: Inbound email, outbound SMTP, chat embed code, and Twilio SMS — configured step by step.

Customer 360 with CRM & commerce in the ticket sidebar
Major incident war rooms & post-incident review

faqs.q: How does the {trialDays}-day free trial work?
faqs.a: Sign up and get full platform access for {trialDays} days. No credit card required. When your trial ends, choose a plan that fits your team to keep your workspace active.

faqs.q: Can I use my own domain?
faqs.a: Yes. Every workspace includes a dedicated subdomain (e.g. acme.yourplatform.com). On Pro plans, connect your own domain (e.g. support.yourcompany.com) from Settings → Custom domain — add the DNS records we provide, verify ownership, and optionally redirect visitors from your platform subdomain to your branded URL.
Email (inbound webhook, IMAP, and OAuth), live chat widget, SMS via Twilio, and a branded customer portal. All channels create tickets in the same shared inbox with multi-brand routing.

Service Desk is an optional paid add-on for any paid plan. It adds ITIL-style workflows on top of your existing tickets: type queues for incidents, requests, changes, and problems; catalog and change approvals; change calendar with CAB; problem records with linked incidents; and major incident war rooms with post-incident review.
Yes. A REST API covers authentication, tickets, contacts, service desk records, knowledge base, and billing snapshots — plus OpenAPI documentation for custom integrations and internal tooling.

Pro plans include SAML and OIDC single sign-on. Configure your identity provider in Settings → Security and agents sign in with your corporate credentials alongside optional two-factor authentication.

faqs.q: How does pricing work after the trial?
faqs.a: Plans are based on team size (agents) and monthly ticket volume. Professional includes automation, SLA, service catalog, and live chat. Pro adds AI, integrations, assets, SSO, and custom domain. AI Copilot, Integrations, and Service Desk ITSM are optional monthly add-ons on any paid plan. Upgrade anytime from your workspace billing settings.
Export tickets and contacts via CSV, or use the API to import data programmatically. Our unified inbox and service catalog make it straightforward to ramp without losing context.

central.social_proof_title: One platform, fewer tools to manage
central.social_proof_subtitle: Teams switch from shared inboxes and pieced-together stacks when they need SLA, chat, KB, and optional ITSM in one workspace.

social_proof_testimonials.quote: We replaced email threads and a separate KB in the first week. Agents finally work from one inbox with SLA timers that actually match our hours.
social_proof_testimonials.name: Priya S.

social_proof_testimonials.quote: Live chat plus the portal deflected a third of repeat questions before they became tickets. Setup during the trial was straightforward.
social_proof_testimonials.name: Marcus T.

social_proof_testimonials.quote: Multi-brand support for client portals without juggling logins — that alone paid for the switch from our old helpdesk.

central.compare_disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available product information. Competitor plans and packaging change — verify current details on their websites.

freshdesk.hero_title: Freshdesk alternative for growing support teams
freshdesk.hero_subtitle: Get shared inbox, chat, KB, SLA, AI, and optional ITSM in one workspace — with INR-friendly plans and modular add-ons instead of stacking Freshdesk modules and Freshservice.

reasons.title: Support + ITSM without two products
reasons.body: Add Service Desk ITSM on any paid plan instead of buying Freshservice separately for changes, problems, and major incidents.

reasons.title: AI and integrations your way
reasons.body: Enable AI Copilot or Integrations on Professional, or bundle everything on Pro — no surprise per-agent AI surcharges.

reasons.title: Transparent India pricing
reasons.body: Professional from ₹999/mo with optional add-ons. No credit card required to start your free trial.

faq.q: Is helpefi cheaper than Freshdesk?
faq.a: For many Indian SMB teams, Professional plus optional add-ons costs less than Freshdesk Growth/Pro with AI and marketplace apps — especially when you need ITSM alongside support.

faq.q: Can we migrate from Freshdesk?
faq.a: Export tickets and contacts to CSV and import via the API or admin tools. Most teams run both systems briefly during cutover.

faq.q: Does helpefi replace Freshservice too?
faq.a: The Service Desk add-on covers incidents, changes, problems, approvals, and major incident war rooms — so you may not need a separate ITSM product.

freshdesk.cta_body: Start your trial, connect email, and compare side by side with your current Freshdesk workflow.

zendesk.hero_subtitle: Zendesk excels at scale but often means multiple products, add-ons, and per-agent AI fees. helpefi bundles support, self-service, automation, and optional ITSM with straightforward plans.

reasons.title: Fewer products to stitch together
reasons.body: KB, portal, chat, SLA, and automations live in one workspace — not Zendesk Support plus half a dozen add-ons.

reasons.title: AI on your terms
reasons.body: AI Copilot as an add-on or included on Pro — not a separate Advanced AI line item per agent.

reasons.title: Built for mid-market teams
reasons.body: Fast setup, dedicated subdomain, and pricing that makes sense for 5–50 agent teams.

faq.q: Who should consider helpefi over Zendesk?
faq.a: Teams outgrowing shared inboxes but not ready for Zendesk Suite pricing, or teams that want ITSM adjacent to support without a second vendor.

faq.q: How does AI pricing compare?
faq.a: helpefi offers AI Copilot as a flat monthly add-on or bundled on Pro. Zendesk Advanced AI is typically priced per agent on top of base seats.

faq.q: Can we keep our existing integrations?
faq.a: helpefi supports Slack, Jira, HubSpot, Salesforce, Shopify, webhooks, and a REST API on Pro or with the Integrations add-on.

zendesk.cta_title: See if helpefi fits your team
zendesk.cta_body: Run a parallel trial alongside Zendesk — most teams know within a week.

zoho-desk.hero_title: Zoho Desk alternative with ITSM and AI built in
zoho-desk.hero_subtitle: Zoho Desk is strong inside the Zoho ecosystem. helpefi targets teams that want modern AI, optional Service Desk ITSM, and multi-brand support without committing to the full Zoho stack.

reasons.title: Optional ITSM in the same product
reasons.body: Enable Service Desk for changes, problems, and war rooms — not just customer tickets.

reasons.title: AI Copilot without ecosystem lock-in
reasons.body: Semantic search, reply drafts, and triage without requiring Zoho CRM or Zia bundles.

reasons.title: Agency-friendly multi-brand
reasons.body: Run client brands with separate portals and inboxes from one login.

faq.q: We already use Zoho CRM — should we switch?
faq.a: If Zoho Desk meets your needs inside CRM, stay. helpefi fits teams that want stronger ITSM, multi-brand agency workflows, or best-of-breed integrations outside Zoho.

faq.q: Is helpefi priced similarly in INR?
faq.a: Professional starts at ₹999/mo with optional add-ons. Compare your Zoho Desk tier plus any AI or marketplace costs.

faq.q: Can agents use both during migration?
faq.a: Yes. Import CSV exports and run helpefi in parallel until you're ready to cut over.

zoho-desk.cta_body: Start a free trial and test ITSM, AI, and multi-brand workflows side by side.

freshservice.hero_title: Freshservice alternative for IT + employee support
freshservice.hero_subtitle: Freshservice is ITSM-first. helpefi gives employee and customer support teams a shared inbox, then adds Service Desk ITSM when you need incidents, changes, and war rooms — without a second Freshworks contract.

reasons.title: Customer and employee support together
reasons.body: External customer tickets and internal IT requests in one platform with shared automations and KB.

reasons.title: Pay for ITSM when ready
reasons.body: Start on Professional for helpdesk workflows, enable Service Desk ITSM as an add-on when processes mature.

reasons.title: AI for agents and deflection
reasons.body: Copilot drafts, summaries, and KB assist on Pro or via the AI Copilot add-on.

faq.q: Can helpefi replace Freshservice for a 20-person IT team?
faq.a: Yes, if you enable the Service Desk add-on and use Pro for assets and SSO. Smaller teams often start without ITSM and add it later.

faq.q: Do you support employee self-service?
faq.a: Yes — publish a branded portal with KB articles and service catalog items for laptop requests, access, and more.

faq.q: What about change advisory board workflows?
faq.a: Service Desk includes change calendar, approvals, and CAB-ready flows linked to incidents and problems.

freshservice.cta_title: Unify IT and support on helpefi
freshservice.cta_body: Trial the platform free, then enable Service Desk when your ITIL processes need it.

helpscout.hero_title: Help Scout alternative when you outgrow shared inbox
helpscout.hero_subtitle: Help Scout is excellent for lightweight email support. helpefi picks up where shared inbox ends — SLA, service catalog, live chat, SMS, AI, integrations, and optional ITSM.

reasons.title: SLA and escalation built in
reasons.body: Business hours, breach alerts, and tier policies without third-party tools.

reasons.title: More channels than email alone
reasons.body: Live chat, SMS, portal, and multi-brand routing alongside your inbox.

reasons.title: Room to grow into ITSM
reasons.body: Add Service Desk later if internal IT requests need change and incident management.

faq.q: Is helpefi overkill if we only need email?
faq.a: If email-only is enough, Help Scout may suffice. helpefi fits teams adding chat, SLAs, catalog, or IT workflows within the next 12 months.

faq.q: Will helpefi feel as simple as Help Scout?
faq.a: The agent workspace stays focused — split pane inbox, clean replies, and KB sidebar. Advanced features stay in settings until you need them.

faq.q: How does pricing compare?
faq.a: Starter and Professional tiers target SMB budgets with INR options. Compare Help Scout Plus with AI Answers against helpefi Professional plus add-ons.

helpscout.cta_body: Start your trial and connect email first — add chat, SLA, and AI when you're ready.

ai.hero_title: AI helpdesk software that resolves tickets faster
ai.hero_subtitle: Use AI across your helpdesk to draft replies, deflect repetitive questions, and route complex tickets to the right agent — without replacing human judgment.

features.title: AI Copilot for agents
features.body: Draft replies, summarize threads, and suggest next steps inside the agent workspace.

features.title: Semantic knowledge search
features.body: Surface relevant articles and past tickets so customers and agents find answers faster.

features.title: AI deflection on portal and chat
features.body: Answer common questions before a ticket is created, reducing queue volume.

faq.q: Does AI replace support agents?
faq.a: No. Helpefi AI assists agents and deflects repetitive questions. Your team stays in control of every customer conversation.

faq.q: Can AI use our knowledge base?
faq.a: Yes. AI features can reference published articles and approved content to keep answers accurate and on-brand.

ai.cta_body: Start your free trial and see how AI reduces handle time while improving customer satisfaction.

ticket-management.hero_title: Modern ticket management for support teams
ticket-management.hero_subtitle: Manage email, chat, SMS, and portal requests in one ticket management system with SLA policies, internal notes, and skills-based routing.

features.title: Unified shared inbox
features.body: Every channel creates a ticket in one workspace with full conversation history.

features.title: SLA and escalation rules
features.body: Set response and resolution targets with business hours, tiers, and automated escalations.

features.title: Collaboration built in
features.body: Private notes, @mentions, and linked incidents keep teams aligned on complex issues.

faq.q: Which channels create tickets?
faq.a: Email, live chat, SMS, and your customer portal all route into the same shared inbox.

faq.q: Can we route tickets by skill or team?
faq.a: Yes. Use assignment rules, skills routing, and tier-based SLA policies to match tickets to the right agents.

ticket-management.cta_body: Launch a dedicated workspace in minutes and give your team a faster, clearer way to manage support volume.

knowledge-base.hero_subtitle: Publish a branded knowledge base that powers your customer portal, reduces ticket volume, and feeds AI deflection across chat and email.

features.title: Branded customer portal
features.body: Host help content on your domain with categories, search, and ticket submission.

features.title: Semantic search
features.body: Customers and agents find answers by meaning, not just keywords.

features.title: Article analytics
features.body: See which articles deflect tickets and where content gaps remain.

faq.q: Can we restrict articles by audience?
faq.a: Yes. Control visibility by brand, portal, or customer segment.

faq.q: Does the knowledge base work with AI?
faq.a: Published articles power AI deflection and Copilot suggestions in the agent workspace.

knowledge-base.cta_body: Reduce repeat questions and give customers 24/7 self-service without adding headcount.

automation.hero_subtitle: Build support automation with triggers, SLA policies, macros, and approval workflows so agents focus on complex customer issues.

features.title: Trigger-based automation
features.body: Assign, tag, notify, and escalate tickets automatically based on conditions you define.

features.title: Macros and canned responses
features.body: Speed up replies with reusable templates and multi-action macros.

features.title: Service catalog approvals
features.body: Route service requests through approval chains before fulfillment.

faq.q: Do I need developers to automate?
faq.a: No. Most automations are configured in the admin UI with visual rule builders.

faq.q: Can automation work with SLA policies?
faq.a: Yes. Combine SLA timers, business hours, and automation rules for reliable escalations.

automation.cta_body: Start a free trial and configure your first automation rules in the setup wizard.

live-chat.hero_title: Live chat that converts and resolves
live-chat.hero_subtitle: Embed live chat on your site, route conversations to available agents, and convert chats into tracked tickets with full customer context.

features.title: Embeddable chat widget
features.body: Customize colors, placement, and pre-chat forms to match your brand.

features.title: Real-time agent workspace
features.body: Handle multiple chats alongside email and portal tickets in one inbox.

features.title: Chat-to-ticket continuity
features.body: Every chat becomes a ticket with history, SLA tracking, and follow-up via email.

faq.q: Can chat hand off to email?
faq.a: Yes. Offline messages and follow-ups continue as email tickets with the same thread.

faq.q: Does live chat support AI deflection?
faq.a: Yes. Suggest knowledge base articles before connecting visitors to an agent.

live-chat.cta_title: Add live chat to your site
live-chat.cta_body: Install the widget during setup and start engaging visitors in real time.

integrations.hero_title: Connect your helpdesk to your stack
integrations.hero_subtitle: Integrate Helpefi with Slack, HubSpot, Salesforce, Shopify, Jira, Linear, and more — with customer context surfaced directly in tickets.

features.title: CRM and commerce context
features.body: View HubSpot, Salesforce, and Shopify data in the ticket sidebar.

features.title: Dev tool sync
features.body: Link Jira and Linear issues to support tickets for engineering handoffs.

features.title: SSO and webhooks
features.body: SAML/OIDC sign-in, REST API, and webhooks for custom integrations.

faq.q: Is there a REST API?
faq.a: Yes. Helpefi exposes a documented REST API and webhooks for custom workflows.

faq.q: Which integrations are included?
faq.a: Core integrations include Slack, HubSpot, Salesforce, Shopify, Jira, Linear, Twilio SMS, and SSO.

privacy.hero_subtitle: This Privacy Policy explains how Helpefi collects, uses, shares, and protects personal information when you visit our website, create an account, or use our helpdesk platform.
privacy.effective_date: Effective date: June 13, 2026 · Last updated: June 13, 2026

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: Helpefi ("Helpefi," "we," "us," or "our") provides cloud-based customer support and IT service management software. This Privacy Policy applies to visitors of helpefi.com, trial users, paying customers, and authorized users of Helpefi workspaces.
paragraphs: If you use Helpefi on behalf of an organization, that organization is the controller of most data processed in its workspace. Helpefi processes that data as a service provider according to your organization's instructions and our agreement with you.

sections.title: 2. Information we collect
sections.body: We collect information in three broad categories: information you provide, information generated through use of the service, and information collected automatically.

sections.title: 2.1 Account and registration information
items: Name, email address, job title, and organization name
Workspace subdomain, billing details, and subscription plan selections
Authentication credentials and security settings such as two-factor authentication
Communications with us, including support requests and sales inquiries

sections.title: 2.2 Workspace and customer support data
sections.body: When you use Helpefi, you and your authorized users may submit data into your workspace. Depending on how you configure the platform, this may include:
items: Support tickets, chat transcripts, SMS messages, and email content
Contact and organization records for your customers or employees
Knowledge base articles, attachments, internal notes, and macros
Service catalog requests, approvals, and ITSM records
Integration data synced from third-party tools you connect
paragraphs: You control what data is submitted to your workspace. You are responsible for providing appropriate notices to your end users and obtaining any required consents.

sections.title: 2.3 Usage, device, and log data
items: IP address, browser type, device identifiers, and operating system
Pages viewed, features used, timestamps, and referral URLs on our marketing site
Application logs, error reports, performance metrics, and security audit events
Cookie and similar technology data as described below

sections.title: 2.4 Payment information
sections.body: Subscription payments are processed by our payment partners. We receive billing status, transaction identifiers, and limited payment metadata, but we do not store full payment card numbers on our servers.

sections.title: 3. How we use information
sections.body: We use personal information to operate, secure, and improve Helpefi, including to:
items: Create and administer accounts, workspaces, and user access
Provide ticketing, chat, knowledge base, automation, AI, and ITSM features
Process subscriptions, invoices, trials, and account notifications
Monitor service performance, troubleshoot issues, and prevent fraud or abuse
Respond to support requests and communicate product updates
Analyze aggregated usage to improve reliability, usability, and features
Comply with legal obligations and enforce our Terms of Service

sections.title: 4. AI and automated processing
sections.body: Helpefi offers optional AI capabilities such as reply suggestions, semantic search, and deflection. When enabled, content from your workspace may be processed to generate outputs for your users.
paragraphs: We do not use your workspace content to train public or third-party foundation models for general purposes. AI features are provided to deliver functionality within your account.
You are responsible for reviewing AI-generated content before sending it to customers or relying on it for business decisions.

sections.title: 5. Legal bases for processing (EEA, UK, and Switzerland)
sections.body: Where applicable data protection law requires a legal basis, we rely on one or more of the following:
items: Performance of a contract with you or your organization
Legitimate interests in operating, securing, and improving the service, balanced against your rights
Compliance with legal obligations
Consent, where required, such as for certain marketing cookies or optional communications

sections.title: 6. How we share information
sections.body: We do not sell personal information. We may share information only as described below:
items: Service providers and subprocessors that help us host infrastructure, send email, process payments, provide analytics, or deliver customer support tools
Integration partners you choose to connect to your workspace
Professional advisers, auditors, or authorities when required by law or to protect rights and safety
Successors in connection with a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, subject to this Privacy Policy

sections.title: 7. International data transfers
sections.body: Helpefi may process and store information in countries other than where you are located. Where required, we implement appropriate safeguards such as standard contractual clauses or equivalent mechanisms for cross-border transfers.

sections.title: 8. Data retention
sections.body: We retain information for as long as needed to provide the service, meet legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
paragraphs: Workspace data is retained according to your subscription and workspace settings. After account termination, we may delete or anonymize data within a reasonable period unless law requires longer retention.
Marketing site analytics and security logs are retained for limited periods consistent with operational needs.

sections.title: 9. Security
sections.body: We implement administrative, technical, and organizational measures designed to protect personal information, including access controls, encryption in transit, tenant isolation, audit logging, and regular monitoring.
paragraphs: No method of transmission or storage is completely secure. You are responsible for safeguarding credentials and configuring roles and permissions within your workspace.

sections.title: 10. Your rights and choices
sections.body: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to certain processing of your personal information, and to data portability or withdrawal of consent.
paragraphs: Workspace end users should contact their organization first, because the organization typically controls data in the workspace.
To exercise rights relating to your Helpefi account or this website, email hello@helpefi.com. We may need to verify your identity before responding.
You may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

sections.title: 11. Cookies and analytics
sections.body: Our marketing website may use cookies and similar technologies for essential functionality, preferences, and analytics. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
paragraphs: If we use analytics tools such as Google Analytics, those providers may collect information about your interactions with our site according to their own policies.

sections.title: 12. Children's privacy
sections.body: Helpefi is not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us information, contact hello@helpefi.com and we will take appropriate steps.

sections.title: 13. Changes to this Privacy Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If changes are material, we will provide notice by updating the effective date on this page or through other reasonable means. Continued use of Helpefi after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.title: 14. Contact us
sections.body: For privacy questions, data subject requests, or security reports, contact us at hello@helpefi.com.

terms.hero_subtitle: These Terms of Service govern access to and use of the Helpefi website, platform, APIs, and related services. Please read them carefully before creating an account.
terms.effective_date: Effective date: June 13, 2026 · Last updated: June 13, 2026

sections.title: 1. Agreement to these Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using Helpefi, creating an account, starting a trial, or clicking to accept these Terms, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.
paragraphs: If you use Helpefi on behalf of a company or other entity, you represent that you have authority to bind that entity, and "you" refers to that entity.
If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the service.

sections.title: 2. Description of the service
sections.body: Helpefi is a multi-tenant software-as-a-service platform for customer support, service desk, and related workflows, which may include ticketing, live chat, knowledge base, automation, AI features, integrations, and optional ITSM capabilities.
paragraphs: We may update, modify, or discontinue features from time to time. Beta or preview features may be offered as-is and may change without notice.

sections.title: 3. Eligibility and account registration
items: You must be at least 18 years old and able to form a binding contract
Registration information must be accurate, current, and complete
You are responsible for all activity under your account and for maintaining the confidentiality of credentials
You must promptly notify us of unauthorized access at hello@helpefi.com

sections.title: 4. Free trials and subscriptions
sections.body: Helpefi may offer free trials and paid subscription plans. Trial length, included features, and conversion to paid plans are described on our website or order flow.
paragraphs: Unless otherwise stated, trials do not require a payment method. At the end of a trial, continued use may require selecting a paid plan.
Paid subscriptions renew automatically according to the billing interval you select unless cancelled before the renewal date.
Fees are exclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise. You are responsible for taxes associated with your purchase.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable use
sections.body: You agree not to misuse Helpefi. Without limiting other restrictions, you must not:
items: Violate any applicable law, regulation, or third-party rights
Upload malware, spam, or unlawful, infringing, or abusive content
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the service, other accounts, or our infrastructure
Reverse engineer, scrape, or probe the service except as permitted by law
Use the service to send unsolicited communications or harvest personal data without consent
Interfere with service integrity, security, or performance
Resell or provide the service to third parties except as expressly permitted in your plan
paragraphs: We may investigate violations and suspend or terminate access where reasonably necessary to protect the service or other users.

sections.title: 6. Customer data and privacy
sections.body: You retain ownership of data you and your users submit to your workspace ("Customer Data"). You grant Helpefi a limited license to host, process, transmit, and display Customer Data solely to provide and improve the service, prevent abuse, and comply with law.
paragraphs: You are responsible for Customer Data and for ensuring that your collection and use of personal information through Helpefi complies with applicable privacy laws, including providing notices and obtaining consents where required.

Our Privacy Policy describes how Helpefi handles personal information. For workspace data, you act as controller and Helpefi acts as processor, except where we act as controller for account, billing, and website data.

sections.title: 7. AI features
sections.body: AI-powered features are designed to assist users and may produce inaccurate or incomplete outputs. You are solely responsible for reviewing AI-generated content before use.
paragraphs: Helpefi does not guarantee that AI outputs will be error-free, unbiased, or suitable for any particular purpose. You should not use AI outputs as legal, medical, financial, or other professional advice.

sections.title: 8. Intellectual property
sections.body: Helpefi and its licensors own all rights in the service, software, documentation, branding, and underlying technology, excluding Customer Data.
paragraphs: Subject to these Terms and payment of applicable fees, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the service for your internal business purposes during your subscription term.
You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works of the service except as expressly allowed.

sections.title: 9. Third-party services and integrations
sections.body: Helpefi may integrate with third-party products or services. Your use of third-party services is governed by their terms and privacy policies, not these Terms.
paragraphs: We are not responsible for third-party services, and enabling an integration may involve sharing data with that provider at your direction.

sections.title: 10. Service availability and support
sections.body: We use commercially reasonable efforts to maintain availability of the service, but uninterrupted or error-free operation is not guaranteed.
paragraphs: Planned maintenance, emergency maintenance, and events outside our reasonable control may affect availability.
Support channels and response targets may vary by plan. Unless a separate written agreement specifies uptime commitments, the service is provided without a service level agreement.

sections.title: 11. Confidentiality
sections.body: Each party may receive non-public information from the other. The receiving party will use the other party's confidential information only to perform under these Terms and will protect it with reasonable care.

sections.title: 12. Termination
sections.body: You may stop using Helpefi at any time and may cancel a paid subscription according to the billing controls in your account.
paragraphs: We may suspend or terminate access if you materially breach these Terms, fail to pay fees when due, or if continued provision poses security or legal risk.

Upon termination, your right to access the service ends. We may delete workspace data after a reasonable retention period unless law requires otherwise. Sections that by nature should survive termination will survive.

sections.title: 13. Disclaimers
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, or statutory, including implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title, and non-infringement.

sections.title: 14. Limitation of liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Helpefi will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, cover, or punitive damages, or for loss of profits, revenue, data, goodwill, or business opportunity, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Helpefi's total liability arising out of or related to the service or these Terms will not exceed the amounts paid by you to Helpefi for the service in the twelve (12) months before the event giving rise to liability.
Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations, so these limits may not apply to you fully.

sections.title: 15. Indemnification
sections.body: You will defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Helpefi and its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, and agents from claims, damages, losses, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from Customer Data, your use of the service, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of applicable law or third-party rights.

sections.title: 16. Changes to these Terms
sections.body: We may modify these Terms from time to time. If we make material changes, we will provide notice by posting the updated Terms on this page and updating the effective date, or by other reasonable means.
paragraphs: Continued use of Helpefi after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree, you must stop using the service.

sections.title: 17. General provisions
items: These Terms constitute the entire agreement regarding the service and supersede prior or contemporaneous understandings on the same subject
If any provision is unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in effect
You may not assign these Terms without our consent; we may assign them in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets
Failure to enforce a provision is not a waiver of the right to enforce it later

Except where prohibited by applicable law, these Terms are governed by the laws of India, without regard to conflict of law principles, and courts in Bengaluru, Karnataka shall have exclusive jurisdiction

sections.title: 18. Contact
sections.body: Questions about these Terms may be sent to hello@helpefi.com.

blog.index_subtitle: Guides on AI helpdesk software, ticket management, ITSM, and customer support best practices.

ai-helpdesk-software-guide.title: How to choose AI helpdesk software in 2026
ai-helpdesk-software-guide.excerpt: A practical guide to evaluating AI customer support tools — deflection, Copilot, security, and total cost of ownership.
body_paragraphs: AI helpdesk software has moved from novelty to expectation. Support leaders now evaluate platforms on how well AI reduces handle time, deflects repetitive tickets, and keeps agents in control.
Start with outcomes: measure what percentage of tickets can be deflected with your existing knowledge base, and how much agent time Copilot saves on draft replies.
Look for semantic search across articles and past tickets, not just keyword matching. The best AI customer support tools ground answers in your approved content.
Security matters. Confirm data retention policies, whether models train on your tickets, and how SSO and audit logs fit your compliance requirements.

Finally, compare total cost: base plan, AI add-ons, per-seat pricing, and whether ITSM or multi-brand support requires a separate product. Helpefi combines helpdesk, AI, and optional Service Desk in one platform with transparent pricing.
